evaluation.notes: Three challenge models: Rapid, Legacy, and Bolt. Rapid profit targets: $1,500 ($25K), $3,000 ($50K), $5,000 ($100K). Legacy profit targets: $1,250 ($25K), $2,500 ($50K), $6,000 ($100K). Bolt profit target: $3,000 ($50K). Rapid trailing loss limits: $1,000 ($25K), $2,000 ($50K), $2,500 ($100K). Legacy trailing loss limits: $1,000 ($25K), $2,000 ($50K), $3,000 ($100K). Bolt: fixed daily aggregate loss limit of $1,000 and trailing loss limit of $2,000 on the $50K account. All accounts operate in a simulated trading environment using demo accounts. Contract limits scale with account size. Reset fee: 10% discount on original challenge fee. All payments are final — no refunds.

pricing.refundPolicy: All payments are final — no refunds

rules.notes: FundedNext Futures provides simulated trading challenges using demo accounts. Three challenge models: Rapid, Legacy, and Bolt — each with different targets, loss limits, and rules. All positions must be closed by end of session — no overnight holding. Automated trading (bots, EAs, HFT) prohibited. DCA/overleveraging not allowed. Hedging across accounts prohibited. If a contract moves within 2% of CME price limit, trading that instrument must stop for the day. Reset fee: 10% discount on original challenge fee. All payments are final — no refunds.

markets.instruments: Futures — Currencies, Equity Indices, Metals, Energy, Agriculture (CME Group)
